Türkçe

Directorate of Student Affairs

Dear Students,

Welcome to Kadir Has University, where you will open a brand-new page in your life, meet contemporary knowledge, think freely and make new friends!

As the

Student Affairs Directorate

, we work to ensure that all the opportunities offered by our university are carried out in an orderly manner and continuously developed. Our priority is to always be in touch with you, evaluate your feedback and be with you in any matter you need. Our aim is to guide you and provide the necessary support services so that you have a happy and successful student experience.

You can easily reach us in person or via e-mail whenever you need support during your student life or after graduation.

We wish all our students an enjoyable, productive and unforgettable university life.

Services offered by our unit:

Military service procedures

Information about double major, minor and internal horizontal transfer

Course registrations, course add-drop and course withdrawal procedures

Course exemption and transfer procedures

Preparation of diploma, diploma supplement, minor certificate, degree and honor certificates

Registration freeze and registration cancellation procedures

Registration procedures

Determination of KHAS High Honor/Honor Scholarships

Graduation and student leaving procedures

Curriculum entries and course adaptation procedures

Preparation of reports regarding students

Information about single course and grade increase exams

Information about regulations, guidelines, application principles and online systems
